case_title: WONG, JOSEPHINE vs. JAE, KIM JONG et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, JOSEPHINE

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER DESIGNATING CASE AS UNINSURED MOTORIST BY JUDGE WICK; STATUS CONFERENCE CONTINUED TO 24/JUL/96 IN DEPT. 4, DECLARATION, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, JOSEPHINE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-24-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-24-1996, FOR PLAINTIFFS FAILURE TO PROVIDE A DECLARTION DETAILING ALL STEPS TAKEN TO PROSECUTE THE UNINSURED MOTORIST ACTION. HEARING SET FOR AUG-23-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, JOSEPHINE
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, JOSEPHINE

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-23-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-23-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT. NO APPEARANCE AND/OR GOOD CAUSE MAY RESULT IN DISMISSAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-15-1996 CONTINUED FROM AUG-23-1996 TO SEP-23-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-16-1996, CONTINUED TO FEB-15-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR "UNINSURED MOTORIST" DECLARATION AND ORDER. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-15-1996, CONTINUED TO JUL-24-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PURSUANT TO RULE 301(C) RULES OF COURT, UNINSURED MOTORIST CASE IS HEREBY ASSIGNED TO PLAN II. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO APPEAR OR FILE DECLARATION DESCRIBING PROCESSING OF THIS UNINSURED MOTORIST CASE. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE IF NECESSARY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-23-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CONTINUED FROM 9/23/96: FOR FURTHER CASE STATUS REPORT. HEARING SET FOR OCT-23-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-22-1995, CONTINUED TO JAN-16-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR COMPLIANCE WITH LOCAL RULE 301(C). PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, JOSEPHINE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, JOSEPHINE AS TO DEFENDANT JAE, KIM JONG DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-22-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-23-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-04-1995
